raw.subject: Top Notch Barbershop in Fargo; Something I noticed about your Facebook page
raw.body:
Hi,

Your posts about supporting ND universities like NDSU and Concordia caught my eye. It's great to see local businesses like yours giving back to the community.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might be leaving some potential customers who prefer to browse menus online from missing out.

I sketched a simple homepage idea from what you post on Facebook, featuring a menu hero section with your popular items, as well as a hours block so customers know when to visit.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/top-notch-barbershop-fargo

If you're interested in turning this into a working site, I'd be happy to discuss the details and provide a quote for local businesses like yours.

Just reply or let's schedule a quick call to explore further.
